title: expense-report model tracks expense claims and approvals
content:
# expense-report model tracks expense claims and approvals

`powerhouse/expense-report` (18 ops) handles expense claim workflows. Part of the Reporting zone alongside [[invoice model generates formal payment requests]] and [[snapshot-report model provides point-in-time data captures]].

## Position in Ecosystem

Reporting zone. May reference [[accounts model defines the chart of accounts structure]] for expense categorization and feed into [[account-transactions model tracks financial transaction records]] for financial recording.

---

- [[ecosystem map]]
- [[object relations]]
description: 18 operations — manages expense submissions with line items, approval workflows, and reimbursement tracking
